dashboard.title: Veterinary Imaging Dashboard
dashboard.recentAnalysesDesc: View your recent veterinary image analyses
dashboard.availableModelsDesc: Browse AI models for different veterinary imaging tasks

footer.tagline: Veterinary imaging platform powered by DICOMweb standards and AI analysis models.
footer.poweredBy: Powered by Cornerstone.js • DICOMweb • OHIF Viewer • Django REST Framework

audit.title: Audit Trail Report
audit.subtitle: Generate and download audit trail reports for compliance monitoring

documentation.title: Documentation
documentation.subtitle: Everything you need to integrate, use, and build with VetImage. Comprehensive guides, API references, and examples.
documentation.needHelpDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

sections.gettingStartedDesc: Quick start guide to begin using VetImage
sections.apiReferenceDesc: Complete REST API documentation with examples

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.subtitle: Your data security matters. Learn how VetImage protects your clinic and pet-owner data — and how our AI is meant to be used.
security.hipaaCompliantDesc: Encryption, access control, and audit logging for your clinic and owner data.
security.questionsDesc: Our security team is available to answer any questions about our security practices, certifications, or to provide documentation for compliance reviews.

features.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption.
features.hipaaDesc: Owner personal data is handled following GDPR principles. Veterinary imaging is not subject to HIPAA (which covers human health data only).
features.authDesc: Multi-layered security with JWT tokens and API keys with granular permissions.
features.isolationDesc: Complete data segregation between users and organizations.
features.auditLoggingDesc: Comprehensive logging of all system activities and data access.
features.infrastructureDesc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure with redundancy and monitoring.

disclosure.title: Responsible Disclosure
disclosure.description: We take security seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please report it to us responsibly.
disclosure.reward: Eligible researchers may receive acknowledgment and rewards through our bug bounty program.

security.aiDesc: VetImage AI is clinical decision support — not a diagnosis. Every AI result is a draft for a qualified veterinarian to review and approve. AI may miss findings; it never replaces professional judgement.
security.notDevice: Not a medical device. Not FDA-cleared. For veterinary decision support and research only.

aiDisclaimer.short: Decision support — not a diagnosis. A qualified veterinarian must review and approve all AI results. AI may miss findings.
